The 'Start-up Mode' condition is combined with the trigger, and no explicit outer scope is used.
decision2_substring: Start-up Mode: If the pressure sensor fails to connect or reports an error condition after a fixed number of retries (maximum 5)
decision3_substring: the controller shall transition to the fail-safe mode
output_structured_natural_language: whenever StartUpMode & pressureSensorRetries_greaterThanOrEqual_5, immediately satisfy failSafeMode
